meaning: IBM公司生产的笔记本电脑
examples: This entire environment will run on an IBM Thinkpad T40 series machine.
Shaking the ThinkPad enables a quick switch between modes for more intuitive navigation.
For example, to look for information on running Linux on a Lenovo thinkpad t43, try a search for thinkpad t43 Linux.
ThinkPad Twist makes it easy to choose one affordable device that can do it all.
When Lenovo throws a party for the ThinkPad, does IBM get invited?
